itach_busy.message: The iTach infrared port is busy.

itach_connection_failed.message: Failed to communicate with the iTach device: {error}

itach_rejected_command.message: The iTach device rejected the command: {error}

cannot_connect.description: Home Assistant cannot connect to the configured iTach IP2IR device. Check that the device is powered on, reachable from Home Assistant, and using the configured network address. After fixing the network or device issue, reload the integration.
cannot_connect.title: iTach IP2IR cannot be reached

invalid_config.description: Home Assistant could not set up the configured iTach IP2IR device because the stored configuration or device response is invalid. Reconfigure the integration or reload it after fixing the device or network configuration.
invalid_config.title: iTach IP2IR configuration problem

no_ir_ports.description: The configured iTach IP2IR device does not currently expose any infrared-capable ports. Check the iTach port configuration and make sure at least one port is configured as IR Out or IR Blaster Out, then reload the integration.
no_ir_ports.title: No infrared-capable iTach ports are available
